title: Test 3
questions: How often do you use your phone during the day?
What kind of videos do you usually watch online?
Do you prefer reading on paper or on a screen? Why?
What subject at school do you find most interesting?
Do you prefer learning new things alone or with a teacher?
What skill would you like to learn in the future?
